---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for WalletGuard Pro
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Or what limitation does it remove?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you want WalletGuard Pro to do.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve the same problem, and why you think the proposed solution is better.

## Use case

A concrete example of how you'd use this feature. Which dApp, which scenario, which chain.

## Mockup / examples

Optional — sketches, screenshots from similar tools, links to other extensions that do this.

## Scope

Roughly how big is this change?
- [ ] Small (one file, <50 lines)
- [ ] Medium (new module + tests, ~200 lines)
- [ ] Large (new architecture, multi-file refactor)

## Willing to contribute

- [ ] I'd send a PR
- [ ] I'd write the design doc but not code
- [ ] Just an idea — someone else can implement
